scripts.ci:strict: pnpm lint:workflows && pnpm -r build && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:vitest && pnpm test:node && pnpm test:coverage:vitest && pnpm test:coverage:node
scripts.test: pnpm -r build && pnpm test:vitest && pnpm test:node
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm -r build && pnpm test:coverage:vitest && pnpm test:coverage:node
scripts.test:coverage:node: c8 --all --exclude "**/dist/**" --src apps/openassist-cli/src/commands --src apps/openassist-cli/src/lib --src apps/openassistd/src/channel-settings.ts --reporter=text-summary --reporter=lcov --report-dir coverage/node --check-coverage --lines 79 --functions 80 --branches 70 --statements 79 tsx --test tests/node/cli-*.test.ts tests/node/install-bootstrap-idempotence.test.ts tests/node/bootstrap-interactive-contract.test.ts
